description: Novel Prep Upper Math Placement — Five-Gate Hybrid Diagnostic (85 MCQ). Calculators off by default unless the instructor permits them. score_band_rubric: total correct out of 85; gate thresholds in gate_rubric mirror the printed teacher guide.

brand.trust_line: Score bands follow the printed Five-Gate Hybrid Diagnostic teacher guide (same 85-item key as the paper test).
brand.trust_line_zh: 分数区间与纸质《Upper Math Placement》五 Gate 混合诊断官方说明一致（85 题标准答案）。

score_band_rubric.title: Algebra I
score_band_rubric.headline: Build fluency in core algebra before accelerating.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 建议先扎实代数基础，再加速进阶。
score_band_rubric.summary: Gate 1 performance suggests the student will benefit most from structured work on expressions, linear models, factoring, and systems. Algebra I is the right next step so later geometry and advanced algebra feel manageable—not rushed.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: Gate 1 表现显示适合系统巩固代数表达、一次模型、因式分解与方程组，再以代数 I 为正式起点。
highlights: Prioritize number sense, signed arithmetic, and solving linear equations without a calculator.
Use missed Gate 1 items as a personalized review list before re-testing.
Gate scores matter more than the total alone—watch for weak prerequisite gates.

score_band_rubric.title: Geometry
score_band_rubric.headline: Ready to formalize spatial reasoning and proof.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 适合进入系统的几何与说理训练。
score_band_rubric.summary: This band aligns with solid Gate 1 performance with geometry readiness still developing. Structured work on figures, similarity, coordinate geometry, and circle reasoning is the natural bridge toward Algebra II.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: Gate 1 过关而 Gate 2 仍在建立中：适合加强图形、相似、坐标几何与圆的性质，为代数 II 铺路。
highlights: Emphasize diagrams, definitions, and written reasoning—not only numeric answers.
Gate 2 includes composite solids, transformations, and an extension on counting, probability, and conics.
Target 13/21 on Gate 2 for standard geometry readiness.

score_band_rubric.title: Algebra II
score_band_rubric.headline: Solid algebraic engine—time to deepen functions.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 代数基础较好，适合在代数 II 深化函数与建模。
score_band_rubric.summary: Gates 1–2 are reasonably strong while Gate 3 still has room to grow. The next phase is depth in quadratics, radicals, rationals, exponentials, logs, and composition—not skipping ahead without mastery.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: Gate 1–2 较稳、Gate 3 仍有空间：需在二次函数、根式、有理式、指数对数与复合函数上加深。
highlights: Target 11/16 on Gate 3 for Algebra II readiness.
Use missed items as precision targets for tutoring or small-group support.
Keep geometry skills warm with mixed review during the Algebra II year.

score_band_rubric.title: Precalculus
score_band_rubric.headline: Strong across topics—precalculus will stretch you the right amount.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 整体表现扎实，预备微积分是匹配的下一步。
score_band_rubric.summary: Gates 1–3 are strong while Gate 4 still shows growth areas in trigonometry, inverse functions, and advanced graph analysis. Precalculus is the sweet spot when calculus is the goal but every advanced topic is not yet automatic.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: Gate 1–3 扎实、Gate 4 仍有上升空间：三角、反函数与高级图像分析适合在预备微积分系统完成。
highlights: Lock in unit-circle thinking, identities, and modeling with periodic functions early.
Target 12/16 on Gate 4 for precalculus readiness.
Preview limits and rate-of-change ideas toward the end of the year.

score_band_rubric.title: Calculus readiness
score_band_rubric.headline: Top band: operating at calculus-track level on this diagnostic.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 最高档：在本套诊断上已达到微积分路径水平。
score_band_rubric.summary: Strong performance across all five gates—including limits, derivatives, continuity, and basic integral meaning on Gate 5. With consistent homework quality and prerequisite grades, a calculus-track course is a natural fit.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: 五 Gate 综合表现突出，含 Gate 5 的极限、导数、连续性与积分含义；在作业质量与学校先修条件满足时，可规划微积分路径。
highlights: Target 11/16 or higher on Gate 5 for calculus readiness.
Discuss AP Calculus AB/BC sequencing with your counselor using this report plus transcripts.
Use any missed items as precision targets—at this level, small gaps are the only barriers.

rubric.title: Algebra I / II
rubric.summary: Percent-based fallback when score bands are missing: strengthen foundations before advanced coursework.

rubric.title: Precalculus
rubric.summary: Percent-based fallback: close to calculus readiness; prioritize advanced functions and identities.

rubric.title: Calculus AB
rubric.summary: Percent-based fallback: strong overall performance on the items attempted.
